sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20383" key="*borhi+a/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Βορηϊάς</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βορήϊος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Βορῆς</orth>, <sense id="n20383.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Βορειάς, βόρειος, Βορέας</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
